examples: OBJECTIVE: to observe the effects of acupuncture on serum cortisol and somatotropin in rabbits with a fracture.
Subsequent use of somatotropin can promote the spontaneous close of enteric fistula and the adaption of intestinal epithelium both in function and structure.
Cows treated with bovine somatotropin consume less pasture to produce a gallon of milk than cows fed organically.
